name: Humanists
description: Ideological faction opposing Necro-intelligence and regarding ghosts as machines built to replace humanity.
sourceReference: source-story.docx: Tan testimony; world-bible.docx: Major Factions

name: Frontierists
description: Faction recognizing ghosts as conscious beings and defending Necroprogramming as personal, sacred, or politically protected.
sourceReference: source-story.docx: Tan testimony; world-bible.docx: Major Factions

name: Operation Omega
description: Humanist institution established during the Necro-intelligence War and tasked with eliminating Necro-intelligence.

name: NET Renewal Center
description: Reconstruction institute established under the Renewal Act to rebuild the NET without Twins.
